title: Elara Community Overview
content: Elara is a master-planned community by Stockland located in Marsden Park, Sydney's North West. It offers a range of home designs and land packages surrounded by parks, playgrounds, and walking trails. Elara features a vibrant town centre, schools, and convenient access to the M7 motorway. The community is designed for families, first-home buyers, and investors seeking modern suburban living.

title: Willowdale Community Overview
content: Willowdale is a thriving Stockland community in Leppington, South West Sydney. It features a mix of house and land packages, townhomes, and apartments. Willowdale includes a town centre with retail, dining, and essential services. The community is well-connected via the Leppington train station and offers extensive green spaces, sporting fields, and community facilities.

title: Aura Community Overview
content: Aura is one of Australia's largest master-planned communities, located on the Sunshine Coast in Queensland. Developed by Stockland, Aura spans over 2,300 hectares and will eventually be home to around 50,000 residents. It features diverse housing options, schools, parks, a town centre, health precinct, and extensive trail networks. Aura is ideal for families and professionals seeking a coastal lifestyle.

title: Minta Community Overview
content: Minta is a Stockland community located in Berwick, Melbourne's south-east growth corridor. It offers a selection of land lots and house and land packages in a well-connected location close to schools, shopping centres, and the Princes Freeway. Minta features landscaped parks, playgrounds, and walking paths designed for active family living.

title: Katalia Community Overview
content: Katalia is a Stockland residential community in Medowie, located in the Hunter Region of New South Wales. It provides affordable land and house and land packages in a peaceful semi-rural setting. Katalia is close to Nelson Bay, Stockton Beach, and the vibrant city of Newcastle, making it a great option for those seeking a relaxed lifestyle with urban amenities nearby.

title: Land Package Pricing Ranges
content: Stockland land packages vary by community and lot size. Typical pricing ranges are: Elara (Marsden Park) from $480,000 to $750,000; Willowdale (Leppington) from $450,000 to $700,000; Aura (Sunshine Coast) from $320,000 to $550,000; Minta (Berwick) from $390,000 to $620,000; Katalia (Medowie) from $250,000 to $420,000. Prices are subject to availability and may change. Contact a sales consultant for the latest pricing.

title: House and Land Package Pricing
content: Stockland house and land packages combine a land lot with a home design from a partnered builder. Typical pricing ranges from $550,000 to $1,200,000 depending on the community, lot size, and home design selected. First-home buyers may be eligible for government grants and stamp duty concessions that can significantly reduce upfront costs. Speak with a Stockland sales consultant for tailored pricing.

title: Available Property Types
content: Stockland communities offer a variety of property types to suit different lifestyles and budgets. These include: standard residential land lots (ranging from 250sqm to 700sqm+), house and land packages with partnered builders, townhomes and terrace homes for low-maintenance living, and in select communities, apartments. Each property type comes with access to community amenities including parks, trails, and retail precincts.

title: Compact and Terrace Home Options
content: For buyers seeking low-maintenance living, Stockland offers compact lots and terrace homes in select communities. These homes typically range from 150sqm to 300sqm and are ideal for first-home buyers, downsizers, and investors. Terrace homes often feature modern open-plan designs, private courtyards, and are located close to community amenities and transport links.

title: Virtual Tours and Display Homes
content: Stockland offers virtual tours of display homes and community masterplans for buyers who cannot visit in person. Virtual tours are available on the Stockland website and can be accessed via desktop or mobile devices. Display villages are open in most communities with a range of builder partners showcasing different home designs. To book a virtual or in-person tour, contact the community sales team or visit stockland.com.au.

title: Interactive Masterplan Viewer
content: Each Stockland community features an interactive masterplan viewer on its website. The viewer allows prospective buyers to explore available lots, see their proximity to parks, schools, and amenities, and filter by lot size and price range. The masterplan is regularly updated to reflect current availability. For assistance navigating the masterplan, contact the sales team who can walk you through options via phone or video call.

title: Booking a Sales Consultation
content: Prospective buyers can book a free consultation with a Stockland sales consultant to discuss their needs, budget, and preferred community. Consultations are available in person at community sales centres, by phone, or via video call. To book, visit stockland.com.au, call 13 52 63, or send a direct message on our social media channels. Our consultants can help with lot selection, builder introductions, and finance guidance.

title: What to Expect at a Consultation
content: During a Stockland sales consultation, our team will discuss your lifestyle needs, budget, and timeline. We will walk you through available lots and house and land packages, explain the buying process, and provide information on government incentives for eligible buyers. You can also tour display homes and explore the community. There is no obligation, and our team is here to help you make an informed decision.

title: First Home Buyer Grants and Incentives
content: First-home buyers purchasing in a Stockland community may be eligible for government grants and incentives. These include the First Home Owner Grant (FHOG), which varies by state (e.g., $10,000 in NSW, $10,000 in QLD, $10,000 in VIC for new homes), stamp duty concessions or exemptions, and the First Home Guarantee scheme allowing purchases with as little as 5% deposit without lenders mortgage insurance. Eligibility criteria apply — speak with our sales team for details.

title: The Buying Process at Stockland
content: The typical buying process at Stockland involves: 1) Exploring communities and available lots online or in person. 2) Booking a consultation with a sales consultant. 3) Selecting a lot and signing a contract of sale. 4) Choosing a builder partner and home design (for house and land packages). 5) Obtaining finance approval. 6) Settlement and land registration. 7) Construction of your home. 8) Handover and move-in. The entire process from contract to move-in typically takes 12 to 24 months depending on the stage of the community.

title: Finance and Mortgage Options
content: Stockland partners with finance brokers who can assist buyers with mortgage pre-approval and loan options. We recommend obtaining finance pre-approval before selecting a lot to understand your budget. Construction loans are commonly used for house and land packages, where funds are drawn down in stages as the home is built. Our sales consultants can introduce you to trusted finance partners who understand the new home buying process.

title: Sustainability and Green Living
content: Stockland is committed to sustainability across its communities. Features include energy-efficient home designs, solar panel options, water-sensitive urban design, native landscaping, and extensive green spaces. Many communities include community gardens, recycling programs, and electric vehicle charging infrastructure. Stockland has been recognised as a global leader in sustainability by the Dow Jones Sustainability Index.

title: Schools and Education Facilities
content: Stockland communities are planned with education in mind. Most communities include or are located near primary schools, secondary schools, and childcare centres. For example, Elara features Northbourne Public School within the community, Aura includes multiple schools across its stages, and Willowdale is close to several established schools. Detailed information about nearby schools is available on each community's page at stockland.com.au.

title: Community Amenities and Lifestyle
content: Stockland communities are designed with a focus on lifestyle and wellbeing. Common amenities include landscaped parks and playgrounds, walking and cycling trails, sporting fields and courts, community centres, retail and dining precincts, and dog parks. Select communities also feature swimming pools, fitness stations, and BBQ areas. These amenities are progressively delivered as the community grows.

title: Builder Partner Network
content: Stockland works with a curated network of reputable builder partners in each community. Builder partners include well-known names such as Metricon, McDonald Jones, Rawson Homes, Coral Homes, and Henley Homes, among others. Each builder offers a range of home designs suited to the lot sizes available. Buyers can visit display homes in the community's display village to compare designs and inclusions. Our sales team can help match you with the right builder for your needs and budget.
